languages.text: {n}Старейшины нервно переглядываются. Бесстрастные маски более не скрывают их трепета.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Старейшины нервно переглядываются. Бесстрастные маски более не скрывают их трепета.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Старейшины нервно переглядываются. Бесстрастные маски более не скрывают их трепета.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}
{n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}
{n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Ältesten tauschen besorgte Blicke aus. Die leidenschaftslosen Masken können ihre Beunruhigung nicht länger verbergen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les aînés échangent des regards inquiets. Les masques sans passion ne cachent plus leur inquiétude.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}长老们交换着担忧的眼神。毫无激情的面具再也无法掩盖他们的惶恐。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los ancianos intercambian miradas preocupadas. Las máscaras sin pasión ya no ocultan su inquietud.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}長老たちは心配そうに視線を交わす。情熱のない仮面はもはや怯えを隠せない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaşlılar endişeli bakışlarla birbirlerine bakarlar. Tutkusuz maskeler artık endişelerini gizleyemiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Elders exchange worried glances. The passionless masks no longer hide their trepidation.{/n}
